item.name: Squeak the Coyote
item.description:
Quiet as a cloud and swift as a lightning bolt when on the prowl.

Use item to acquire the Squeak the Coyote minion.
item.tooltip:
Spend too long peering at the ground,
and a coyote is sure to come and bite
you on the arse.
   - Thaffe
item.specialactiondescription: Removes all detrimental effects from all allies within range.
